hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Clean small independent tire shop exterior with tires visible and bay open, residential-commercial corridor, photorealistic, no people, no brand logos, no text signage.
hero.caption_context: Small local shop positioning — hero should emphasize the independent, neighborhood-scale feel. Not chain aesthetic. Andrew's personal brand ('honest, fair') is the trust anchor — if Bruce surfaces a photo of Andrew, that's better than an empty shop.

gallery.context: New tire inventory stacked/displayed. Caption 'New tires — major brands, reasonable price'.
Used tire inventory — the differentiator from chains. Caption 'Used tires — budget option, honest quality'.
Tech repairing a flat — Andrew ideally. Caption 'Flat repair — fixed when others tell you to replace'.
Mounting + balancing machine at work. Caption 'Mount + balance — done right, first time'.
Tow truck in operation — the secondary service line. Caption 'Towing — same shop, same team'.
Andrew personally. Caption names him — 'Andrew · Honest on every estimate' reinforces the 2-of-5-reviews-name-him pattern.

sections.context: Chamblee / Clairmont Rd streetscape; Unsplash OK if no specific shop-front photos available

notes: Tire shop vertical = tires + shop exterior + tech-at-work. Andrew's personal brand (honest, fair, anti-upsell) is the editorial hook — surface him in the team section even though he may or may not be the owner (flag for owner intake). Used-tire option is the chain-shop differentiator — don't bury it.
